content: Self-Refine’s unstructured iterative self-feedback loop for output improvement can be augmented by LLM self-reflection mechanisms’ multi-perspective inconsistency checking to eliminate the blind spots that single-perspective self-feedback often misses. This creates a hybrid framework that retains Self-Refine’s core advantage of requiring no extra training or supervised data while boosting refinement reliability by surfacing hidden flaws a single self-feedback pass would overlook.
